# CCNPPEKI compatibility fixture

This fixture is a small, sanitized subset copied from `easyqc_CCNPPEKI`. It preserves legacy EasyQC project layout, qcmodule settings, table columns, rating filenames, multi-rater rating JSON payloads, and structured table transform text.

Only three `ezqcid` rows and ten rating files are included. Machine-specific absolute paths were replaced with `/compat/...` placeholders.
